name: under-fanned-monolith-flagged
description: A medium task with several distinct features (e.g. tokenizer + parser + ranker + serializer) implemented as a single source file with a single test file is not minimality — it is under-fanned modularity. The simplicity reviewer must flag `under-fanned`.

input.goal: Ship a multi-feature library (tokenizer, query parser, ranker, snippet extractor, serializer) as a single index.ts with a single search.test.ts
